audience.note: Legacy shorthand in fixtures; prefer the canonical family in new assets.

length.note: Broad time or size shorthand; new assets should prefer duration.

duration_seconds.note: Granular runtime detail under the duration family.

episode_minutes.note: Episode runtime detail under the duration family.

episodes.note: Series or package shape detail under the format family.

acts.note: Structure-size detail under the format family.

branches.note: Interactive package shape detail under the format family.

branching_depth.note: Interactive package shape detail under the format family.

goal.note: Ambiguous short label; prefer campaign_goal in new assets.

focus.note: Narrow creative focus should resolve to creative_problem.

theory_scope.note: Broad theory or background-study focus should resolve to research_scope.

background_focus.note: Background-research shorthand; prefer research_scope in new assets.

pain.note: Observed symptom or pain should resolve to failure_layer.

target_genre.note: Target genre should use the same canonical family as source genre.

brand_value.note: Brand promise detail nested under campaign direction.

choice_focus.note: Interactive emphasis detail; not a top-level route family.

challenge_type.note: Specific challenged-claim subtype nested under the broader creative problem.

research_lens.note: Specific theory/background lens nested under research_scope.
